headline: VICI Properties Inc. (VICI) Well-Positioned for Recurring Development Wins, Says Citizens
summary: VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) is among the 5 Most Profitable Real Estate Stocks Right Now. On March 24, Citizens maintained a Market Outperform rating on VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE:VICI) with a price target of $35. This reaffirmation comes after the company’s announcement of higher involvement in the One Beverly Hills mixed-use development project. What’s even more […]
